title: After-Action Report — Cricket-stat ports: PAI, DO%, xO, DOA%, and O27 Index wiring
scope: Scope: o27/docs/cricket_stat_ports.md, o27v2/analytics/pressure.py, o27v2/analytics/expected_woba.py, o27v2/analytics/__init__.py, o27v2/web/app.py, o27v2/web/templates/leaders.html, o27v2/web/templates/o27i_leaders.html, o27v2/web/templates/o27i_player.html, o27v2/web/templates/stats_browse.html.

rationale.item: The user wanted cricket-inspired Match Impact / True Strike Rate, Dot Ball Percentage, and Expected Wickets concepts ported into O27-native analytics rather than only documented as future ideas.
O27 already persisted enough PA state, contact quality, power-play support, and box-score counters to derive the metrics without a schema migration.
The user clarified that a two-out double play should count as two dead outs and that xO should include defense / power-play support.

actions.description: Added cricket-stat port design note covering PAI, DO%, xO, implementation status, and remaining hooks.
Implemented PAI / PAI per PA / TRR+ as chase-pressure-weighted run value using the run-expectancy matrix.
Implemented expected outs, pitcher dead outs, hitter dead-out avoidance, pure xO, and power-play-supported xO.
Exported the new analytics builders from the analytics package.
Merged PAI/TRR+/DOA% and xO/DO% fields into leaderboard, stats browse, O27 Index, and player-page data rows.
Added UI cards, columns, and sortable leaderboards for PAI, TRR+, DOA%, xO/27, O-xO, DO%, DO-PA%, and Dead Outs.

risk_posture: No new persistent schema was added; all metrics are derived from existing PA logs, box-score tables, and power-play support tables.
PAI intentionally does not replace WPA; it is a run-value/chase-pressure metric rather than a win-probability metric.
xO includes power-play hits saved for the production stat but retains pure_xouts and defense_support_xouts for later decomposition.
DO% counts outs and DO-PA% counts plate appearances so multi-out plays can be represented both ways.

validation_claims.claim: Analytics modules and web app compile after adding PAI, xO, DO%, and DOA%.
validation_claims.evidence_cited: python -m py_compile o27v2/analytics/pressure.py o27v2/analytics/expected_woba.py o27v2/analytics/__init__.py o27v2/web/app.py
validation_claims.check_method: Run the compile command from the repo root.

validation_claims.claim: New exported analytics builders import successfully.
validation_claims.evidence_cited: python import smoke for build_pressure_impact and build_hitter_dead_outs_table

validation_claims.check_method: Run the pytest command from the repo root.

non_actions: Did not add persistent columns to game_pitcher_stats, game_batter_stats, or archive tables.
Did not add a full route-render regression test for the new UI surfaces.
Did not implement Pressure DO% or archive/export snapshots for the new metrics.
residual_risks: PAI uses a first-pass chase-pressure proxy and may need calibration once explicit target/declaration logic is modeled more richly.
Dead-out runner advancement uses occupancy masks rather than runner identity, so edge cases remain heuristic.
xO support includes explicit power-play hits saved but not a full fielder-specific supported-xO model.
open_hooks: Add glossary entries for PAI, TRR+, DO%, DOA%, xO/27, pure xO, and supported xO.
Add unit tests for dead-out counting, hitter DOA mirror, and pure/support xO split.
Consider archive/export persistence once metric definitions stabilize.
Consider Pressure DO% after the PAI pressure model is trusted.
section_headers_original: After-Action Report — Cricket-stat ports: PAI, DO%, xO, DOA%, and O27 Index wiring
parser_notes: Manual AAR record for the cricket-stat ports implementation sequence.
